description: Allowed layer transitions, terminal node policy, run-awareness constraints, and fail conditions for ENL graphs.

allowed_transitions.description: Maps each node_type to the set of node_types it is allowed to declare in derived_from.
allowed_transitions.rationale: Preserves progressive concreteness (ENL-001 Principle 5). Prevents layer collapse and cross-layer shortcuts.

forbidden_transitions.reason: cross-layer shortcut — skips all intermediate layers
same-layer derivation — not permitted in v1
same-layer derivation — not permitted in v1
same-layer derivation — not permitted in v1
same-layer derivation — not permitted in v1

terminal_node_policy.rule: Every valid navigation path must terminate in an EVID node.
terminal_node_policy.enforcement: A graph without at least one EVID node fails validation. A valid chain must reach EVID without interruption through all intermediate layers.
terminal_node_policy.rationale: ENL-001 Principle 3: Every navigation path must terminate in verifiable evidence.

empty_derived_from_policy.rule: derived_from may be an empty array only for nodes of type EVID.
empty_derived_from_policy.non_evid_empty_handling: FAIL — any non-EVID node with an empty derived_from is invalid and must not be accepted.

run_awareness.rule: All nodes in a graph must carry a run_id. All nodes linked via derived_from must share the same run_id.
run_awareness.validation: Validator must compare run_id of each node with run_id of every node it references in derived_from. Mismatch → FAIL.
run_awareness.future_work: Cross-run linking may be considered in a future schema version with explicit declaration and governance rules.

fail_conditions: node_type is not one of the canonical enum values
any required field is absent or null
derived_from references a node_id that does not exist in the graph
a derived_from reference violates allowed_transitions (invalid layer transition)
a non-EVID node has an empty derived_from array
the graph contains no EVID node (evidence termination not satisfied)
the example graph chain is incomplete (does not cover INTEL → SIG-41 → SIG-40 → EVID)
run_id is missing or empty on any node
source_ref is missing or empty on any node
duplicate node_id exists within the same graph
any node in a linked pair belongs to a different run_id than its upstream dependency

not_supported: partial or branching chains (v1 example requires linear chain)
node types beyond INTEL, SIG-41, SIG-40, EVID
v1_scope_boundaries.note: These constraints may be relaxed in future schema versions with explicit governance. v1 is intentionally minimal and strict.
